TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Mia Mottley ryax sa tay 1 nqu tay 10, Mia Mottley, squliq na sezi'. (minhtuw sa kawas tay 1965) mrhuw Barbados ta' misuw hya' ga Mia Mottley, aring ryax tay 25 squ byacing tay 5 sa kawas 2018 lga, musa' spazyang balay ms'rux kya la. qyanux na sraral Mia Mottley minkahul sa Barbados. minqyanux ru qnxan ngasal 1965 kawas: hitgan. qnxan nya cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru'
S.PHON: mia mottlej rjax s~…ēa taj * nqu taj **, mia mottlej, s~…ēquliq na s~…ēezi Ē. (minńßtuw s~…ēa kawas~…ē taj ****) mrńßuw ő≤arő≤a*os~…ē ta Ē mis~…ēuw ńßja Ē …£a mia mottlej, ariŇč rjax taj ** s~…ēqu ő≤ja ¶~ ®iŇč taj * s~…ēa kawas~…ē **** l…£a, mus~…ēa Ē s~…ēpazjaŇč ő≤alaj ms~…ē Ērux kja la. qjanux na s~…ēraral mia mottlej minkańßul s~…ēa ő≤arő≤a*os~…ē. minqjanux ru qnxan Ňčas~…ēal **** kawas~…ē: ńßit…£an. qnxan nja ¶~ ®inkńßulan s~…ēa knita Ē s~…ēa ő≤rő≤iru Ē
